summary: Frontend-only testing of MTSS WellTrack post-refactoring. Tested login, all main pages, redirects, and 401 interceptor behavior. All critical flows passing.
critical_code_review_comments: src/api.js: Central Axios instance looks correct - baseURL uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api, withCredentials:true, 401 interceptor skips /auth/me correctly
401 interceptor also checks window.location.pathname !== '/login' to avoid redirect loops - good
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main flows verified working. Login (email/password) -> dashboard redirect works. Dashboard shows tier distribution + 184 alerts. Students list (251), Interventions, Screening, Analytics (6 tabs visible), Settings (multiple tabs), Student Profile navigation all working. /reports -> /analytics and /users -> /admin redirects confirmed. No 401 intercept issues observed. Note: Playwright text= selector with '&' character causes timeout in tests but actual tab content works fine (verified visually in screenshot).

results.dashboard: PASS - tier distribution (Tier1:79, Tier2:80, Tier3:92), 184 active alerts
results.screening_page: PASS - shows SAEBRS Screener and Student Self-Report options
results.analytics_page: PASS - all 6 tabs visible (Overview, Attendance, Wellbeing & SEL, Interventions, Support & Gaps, Cohort); Overview and Attendance tabs verified functional
results.settings_page: PASS - multiple tabs: General, Branding, MTSS & Screening, Interventions, Student Data, Screening, Calendar, Imports, Integrations, Data
results.no_unexpected_401_redirects: PASS - authenticated pages load without redirect loops
